evidence_quotes.quote: (preventing traders from using dark patterns and other unfair techniques that pressure, deceive and manipulate consumers online)
Eliminating any form of Shilling, Lobbying, Sponsorships, Advertisements, Paid Influencers, etc. with Maximum Prejudice.

paragraphs.text: As an American, we don't have rights. Our culture and our government took that away from us including many countries we're associated with. So we have to rely on you, all the individuals living in and governing the European Union, to protect our rights, the collective rights of all human beings on the planet in some form or another by defending yourselves from us. Our Foreign Interests and Corporations. And it is certainly not safe as an American Citizen to mention the subjects below nor elaborate much further. To any person in Europe reading this if the subjects below are not applicable for this initiative, please save it for another initiative. At the very least remember the topics outlined below by actively thinking about it and sharing it with others. Your work has already proven to palpably, positively impact the quality of life of many Americans. The Points Outlined in the Digital Fairness Act are excellent and tackles one foundational catalyst to all issues (preventing traders from using dark patterns and other unfair techniques that pressure, deceive and manipulate consumers online) that causes overwhelming cascading effects, however it does not highlight the actual underlying issue directly which is an individual or group taking money for the sake and interests of a third party. It is only one surface level aspect of it. The issues will continue to relentlessly show again and again if the root cause is not properly addressed. Every statement listed 1-4 cannot be dismissed as unrelated as they are inextricably linked and must be collectively resolved. 1. Eliminating any form of Shilling, Lobbying, Sponsorships, Advertisements, Paid Influencers, etc. with Maximum Prejudice. Anything involve the act of taking money or assets in exchange of saying a message the recipient does not personally believe in and enacting and engaging in lying or coercion. All participants are actively malicious bad actors against the public and should be identified and handled accordingly as such. 2. Forcing Non-Disclosure Agreements, including Settlements to be automatically void and actions undisclosed therein subject to the law. NDAs are widely utilized for silencing people and keeping criminal secrets legally. Actively restricting critical information that the Public needs to be aware of like Public Health Hazards, Exploitation or complete circumvention of the law itself. 3. Eliminating Corporate Plausible Deniability. Circular blaming, social detachment & distancing, collective group crime through the abuse of group anonymity. Identify specific individuals responsible for specific actions carried out by the corporation and all groups they are affiliated with. 4. Retroactively Dissolve Intellectual Property Rights and force them into Public Domain after 13 Years. 13 years allows a company to thoroughly extract all of an IP's potential. Preserves collective public property, history, art and infrastructure. Preserves the work of millions of workers and professionals. Promotes Healthy Business Practices. Forces and allows Innovation. Massively reduces the severity of planned obsolescence and waste. Promotes economic efficiency. Preserves Market Integrity. Eliminates renting and earning income without providing value. Prevents Patent Hording. Exposes Malicious Industry Practices like systems behind Dark Patterns. Reinforces Decentralized Powerstructures. Stronger economy by not pooling resources towards what society deems unimportant but forced to purchase. Entirely prevents issues regarding buying and ownership regarding all software and hardware. Completely bypasses the need to address protecting and enforcing existing rights of ownership against actively malicious or maliciously negligent corporate actions in contempt of the public like what the Stop Destroying Videogames European Citizens' Initiative or the Right to Repair Movement in the United States call for by solving the foundational issue regarding intellectual property itself.
